nasb.text: Then Paul said to him, “God is going to strike you, you whitewashed wall! Do you sit to try me according to the Law, and in violation of the Law order me to be struck?”

esv.text: Then Paul said to him, “God is going to strike you, you whitewashed wall! Are you sitting to judge me according to the law, and yet contrary to the law you order me to be struck?”

cnv.text: 保羅對他說：“你這粉飾的牆啊，　神要擊打你！你坐堂要按著律法審問我，現在你竟然違背律法吩咐人打我嗎？”

ccb.text: 保罗对亚拿尼亚说：“你这伪君子，上帝要击打你！你坐在那里不是应当依法审问我吗？你怎么违法叫人打我？”

csbs.text: 保罗就对他说：“你这粉饰的墙啊，神将要打你！你坐在那里应按照律法审判我，而你却违背律法，下令打我吗？”
